# --------------------------
# Daya Bay Detector Response Matrix P(E_neutrino; E_reconstructed)
# Data are reported in a 240x240 matrix with 50keV wide bins from 0 to 12MeV
# Column: neutrino energy
# Row: reconstructed energy
